creator: Alexander Terp
description: No calendar-aware date math: "this date + 2 days at the same wall-clock time" currently needs a noon-anchored diff dance to be DST-safe. Something like time_shift(epoch, days=2) with calendar semantics would cover it. Part of the #139 time/date trio, alongside the day-of-week and epoch-to-string formatting cards (both in high).
title: RAD-182: add functions for adding days, etc to time
